home.sysLabel: Addis Ababa City Administration — Finance Bureau
home.heroBody: ARMAS is the official reporting and audit management platform of the Addis Ababa Finance Bureau, providing a unified, transparent and accountable ecosystem for financial oversight across all city-level directorates.
home.aboutTitle: Addis Ababa City Administration Finance Bureau
home.aboutBody: The Addis Ababa City Administration Finance Bureau carries out the functions of providing, allocating, controlling, and establishing a financial system based on the city's development needs, in accordance with the powers and functions granted by the proclamation to realize the city's vision,
home.visionBody: In 2030, to become one of the prominent upper middle income cities by ensuring rapid, sustainable, and inclusive development through the effective management of the city's resources...
home.missionBody: To ensure rapid and sustainable development for the city's residents by implementing fiscal policy and revenue studies to achieve universal prosperity, establishing a transparent and equitable budgetary framework, monitoring and evaluating the performance of government and civil society organization projects, expanding a modern, efficient, and effective financial system, and properly managing the administration's resources.,

values.title: Integrity
values.body: We uphold the highest standards of ethical conduct, honesty, and transparency in all our operations and decisions.

values.title: Accountability
values.body: Every official and department is held to clear performance standards, with outcomes reported and reviewed openly.

values.title: Excellence
values.body: We are committed to continuous improvement in financial management practices to deliver the best services to citizens.

values.title: Inclusiveness
values.body: We value diversity and ensure equitable access to public resources and financial services across all communities.

values.title: Rule of Law
values.body: All financial activities are conducted in full compliance with Ethiopian federal and city-level legal frameworks.

values.title: Transparency
values.body: Public funds and audit findings are reported openly, fostering public trust and confidence in government institutions.

pillars.title: Centralised Reporting
pillars.body: Submit, review, and approve institutional reports from all departments through a single, auditable pipeline.

pillars.title: Full Audit Trails
pillars.body: Every action is timestamped and logged in an immutable record, ensuring complete accountability.

pillars.title: Smart Document Management
pillars.body: Structured document workflows ensure findings, letters and reports are always traceable and retrievable.

pillars.title: Role-Based Access
pillars.body: Fine-grained permissions ensure each user sees and does exactly what their role requires — nothing more.

pillars.title: Real-Time Analytics
pillars.body: Executive dashboards surface the metrics that matter, updated in real time across all reporting units.

pillars.title: 256-bit Security
pillars.body: Enterprise-grade encryption and Keycloak authentication protect all personnel data and sensitive reports.

home.portalNote: Login required to access all modules
home.platformTagline: Audit and Inspection Digital Oversight Platform
home.heroHeadlinePro: Professional oversight for Oromia Finance Bureau reporting workflows
home.heroBodyPro: ARMAS supports the Oromia Bureau of Finance with a secure, traceable, and modern environment for audit intake, inspection follow-up, approval management, and institutional accountability.

heroHighlights.title: Audit Intake
heroHighlights.body: Centralized submission and registration of reports, findings, and official records.

heroHighlights.title: Inspection Workflow
heroHighlights.body: Structured review stages for archivers, auditors, approvers, and bureau leadership.

heroHighlights.title: Secure Governance
heroHighlights.body: Role-based access and traceable actions across the full reporting lifecycle.

home.aboutTitlePro: Oromia Bureau of Finance oversight, redesigned for faster execution
home.aboutBodyPro: This platform supports structured audit, inspection, and reporting operations with a stronger public-sector visual language, clearer hierarchy, and more readable interfaces for day-to-day bureau work.
home.purposeTitlePro: Built for accountable public finance administration
home.ctaBannerBody: Access the ARMAS portal with your institutional credentials.
home.footer: © 2026 ARMAS — Federal Democratic Republic of Ethiopia. All rights reserved.
